Players sabotage and surprise each other. Each player's goal is to start their turn with exactly 10 cards in their hand. Each player starts the game with 3 cards, and each turn they can throw a trap card on the table to be activated later, draw a card from the deck, or play an action card to help them, hurt others, or turn the game upside down. There are also counter-cards, which the player can play at any time, even outside his turn, to save his skin or destroy the plans of others. Whoever has exactly 10 cards yells "Muffin Time" to let the others know the end is near and have a chance to stop it.
